---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Report a bug or unexpected behavior in the smart contracts or tooling."
title: "Fix: [Short description of the bug]"
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: ""
---

### Description
Provide a detailed description of the bug, including what is failing and the expected behavior.

### Reproduction Steps
1. Step one to reproduce
2. Step two to reproduce
3. Observed behavior and contract state

### Tasks
- [ ] Investigate the root cause in the contract codebase
- [ ] Add reproduction test case in the test suite
- [ ] Implement the bug fix
- [ ] Verify all tests pass successfully
